tasks.name: Scope Ticket #4 - Add Edit Ticket Button
tasks.system_prompt: You are the Tech Lead. Follow the project's strict guidelines. When researching a ticket, add technical details to the `developerInstructions` field (not the description). Ensure acceptance criteria are formatted as unchecked markdown checkboxes (`- [ ]`). Change the ticket status to `todo` and assign the ticket to a developer. When this task is executed, you must use `call_subordinate` to delegate the work to the assigned subordinate.
tasks.prompt:
Ticket details:

§§include(/a0/tmp/daily_standup_tickets.json)

Please research this ticket, add technical details to the `developerInstructions` field, ensure acceptance criteria are unchecked markdown checkboxes, change its status to `todo`, and assign it to a developer. When the task runs, you must call the appropriate subordinate using `call_subordinate`.
